title: Batch Processing with Spring Batch + JDBC
description: Build a batch processing pipeline that reads transactions from a CSV file, validates them, enriches with account data from Oracle, and writes results using JDBC batch insert. Include skip/retry logic for resilience.

pipeline: ItemProcessor: Validate + enrich from Oracle (JdbcTemplate lookup)
ItemWriter: JdbcBatchItemWriter for bulk insert to PROCESSED_TRANSACTIONS table
features: Job parameters: input file path, processing date
Oracle stored procedure call for post-processing summary
Job execution metadata in Oracle (Spring Batch tables)

measurement.correctness: All valid records processed, invalid skipped
measurement.oracle_integration: Stored procedure called, batch tables created
measurement.testing: End-to-end test with embedded DB or Testcontainers
